iran_nuke.notes: Day 18 05:00 — ELEVATED RISING. IDF expands strikes to western Iran. 13 US service members killed. No enrichment escalation yet but prolonged war conditions. 27 (rising).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 18 05:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING). Hormuz ZERO traffic. First naval engagement (Hellfire). Trump coalition no takers. Gulf states deny US base use. IDF expands to western Iran. No diplomatic track. 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 18 05:00 — IMMINENT 88 (RISING). FM Sa'ar denies ceasefire talks. France offers to broker. 800+ killed, 850K displaced. Ceasefire track fracturing. 88 (rising).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new India-specific developments. 25 (stable).

russia.notes: Day 18 05:00 — IMMINENT 72 (RISING). Finland seeks NATO nuclear weapons hosting. Kremlin threatens 'appropriate measures.' EU extends sanctions. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

china.notes: DETERRENT RISING. Trump threatens to delay Xi summit over China Hormuz inaction. 12 (rising slightly).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. No new provocations. 12x 600mm MRL test still dominant. 55 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 18 05:00 — IMMINENT 89 (RISING). Zelensky ready for talks but US paused process. Poland scrambled jets. 68 missiles + 430 drones Saturday. 89 + 5 (Turkey coupling) = 94.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 18 05:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING). Kandahar strikes continue. 75+ Afghan civilians killed, 115K displaced (UNHCR). No ceasefire path. 100 (capped, rising).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DETERIORATING (Day 18 05:00): NO de-escalation channels active. Yesterday's Lebanon ceasefire hope fractured after FM denial. Iran hardening. Russia-Ukraine talks stalled. Pakistan-Afghanistan no ceasefire. Global score 86 UP from 85.

latest_news.headline: Strait of Hormuz sees ZERO ship traffic for first time since conflict began
latest_news.text: Zero commercial ship traffic through Strait of Hormuz. Total blockade achieved by Iran mining and naval interdiction. Oil surges.

latest_news.headline: US helicopter fires Hellfire missiles at Iranian boat near USS Abraham Lincoln
latest_news.text: Iranian boat approached USS Abraham Lincoln, US helicopter fired two Hellfire missiles. First direct naval engagement.

latest_news.headline: Israeli FM Sa'ar says NO plans for direct talks with Lebanon
latest_news.text: FM Sa'ar denies plans for direct talks with Lebanon, contradicting earlier ceasefire reports. Ceasefire track uncertain.

latest_news.headline: Gulf states formally deny US use of bases/airspace against Iran
latest_news.text: UAE and Gulf states deny allowing territory for operations against Iran. 2000+ attacks on Gulf states. UAE interceptor costs $2B+.

latest_news.headline: Trump Hormuz coalition gets zero promises from allies
latest_news.text: Trump asked 7 countries for Hormuz warships. No commitments. Coalition-building failing.

latest_news.headline: Finland seeks to host NATO nuclear weapons — Kremlin warns
latest_news.text: Finland seeks legislative changes for nuclear weapons hosting. Kremlin: 'appropriate measures.' New nuclear tension vector.

latest_news.headline: IDF announces barrage of new strikes on western Iran
latest_news.text: Israel expands strikes to western Iran. Military industries across entire production chain targeted. 3+ more weeks planned.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky ready for trilateral peace talks — US paused process
latest_news.text: Zelensky ready for next round of trilateral talks. US paused ceasefire process due to Iran war. No schedule.

latest_news.headline: France offers to broker Lebanon-Israel ceasefire talks in Paris
latest_news.text: Macron: France ready to host talks in Paris. Urged Israel to abandon offensive. But Israeli FM denies plans.

latest_news.headline: Iran claims strikes on Israeli police HQ and satellite communications center
latest_news.text: Iran claims ballistic missile hits on Israeli police headquarters and satellite communications center. 12 killed in Israel by Iranian fire.

outlook: CRITICAL DETERIORATION — Global war probability 86% (Day 18 05:00, UP from 85%). ZERO active de-escalation channels. (1) IRAN IMMINENT 100 capped RISING: Hormuz zero traffic, first naval engagement, Gulf states deny US base use, Trump coalition fails. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON IMMINENT 88 RISING: FM denies ceasefire talks, France offer uncertain. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE IMMINENT 94 RISING: US talks paused, UK diverting aid to ME. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN IMMINENT 100 capped RISING: 75+ civilian deaths, 115K displaced. (5) RUSSIA-NATO IMMINENT 78 RISING: Finland nuclear hosting adds new vector. KEY: Yesterday's only de-escalation channel (Lebanon ceasefire) has fractured. All fronts moving toward escalation.
